functions.name: abs
functions.summary: Returns the absolute value of a number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the absolute value.

functions.name: ln
functions.summary: Returns the natural logarithm of a number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the natural logarithm.

functions.name: log
functions.summary: Returns the logarithm of a number to a specified base.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the logarithm.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: The base to which the logarithm is calculated.

functions.name: pow
functions.summary: Returns the result of raising a number to a power.

parameters.name: base
parameters.description: The base number.

parameters.name: exponent
parameters.description: The exponent to which the base is raised.

functions.name: root
functions.summary: Returns the nth root of a number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the root.

parameters.name: degree
parameters.description: The degree of the root to be calculated.

functions.name: sqrt
functions.summary: Returns the square root of a number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the square root.

functions.name: gcd
functions.summary: Returns the greatest common divisor of two integers.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The first integer.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The second integer.

functions.name: lcm
functions.summary: Returns the least common multiple of two integers.

parameters.name: a
parameters.description: The first integer.

parameters.name: b
parameters.description: The second integer.

functions.name: random
functions.summary: Returns a random integer number between a specified range. If range is not provided, returns a an integer between 0 and 2^63-1. Can be called with one argument to specify the maximum value (exclusive) with minimum value defaulting to 0.

parameters.name: min
parameters.description: The minimum value of the random number (inclusive).

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: The maximum value of the random number (inclusive).

functions.name: sin
functions.summary: Returns the sine of an angle in radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians for which to return the sine.

functions.name: arcsin
functions.summary: Returns the arcsine of a number, which is the angle in radians whose sine is the given number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the arcsine.

functions.name: cos
functions.summary: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians for which to return the cosine.

functions.name: arccos
functions.summary: Returns the arccosine of a number, which is the angle in radians whose cosine is the given number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the arccosine.

functions.name: tan
functions.summary: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians for which to return the tangent.

functions.name: arctan
functions.summary: Returns the arctangent of a number, which is the angle in radians whose tangent is the given number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the arctangent.

functions.name: ctg
functions.summary: Returns the cotangent of an angle in radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians for which to return the cotangent.

functions.name: arcctg
functions.summary: Returns the arccotangent of a number, which is the angle in radians whose cotangent is the given number.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number for which to return the arccotangent.

functions.name: deg
functions.summary: Converts an angle from radians to degrees.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians to convert to degrees.

functions.name: grad
functions.summary: Converts an angle from radians to gradians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in radians to convert to gradians.

functions.name: degtorad
functions.summary: Converts an angle from degrees to radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in degrees to convert to radians.

functions.name: gradtorad
functions.summary: Converts an angle from gradians to radians.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle in gradians to convert to radians.

functions.name: fromhex
functions.summary: Converts a hexadecimal string to a number. Assumes that the hex string represents a positive integer. For signed integers, use fromhexsigned instead.

parameters.name: hexString
parameters.description: The unsigned hexadecimal string to convert.

functions.name: fromhexsigned
functions.summary: Converts a hexadecimal string to a signed integer. The hex string is interpreted as a two's complement signed integer. For unsigned integers, use fromhex instead.

parameters.name: hexString
parameters.description: The signed hexadecimal string to convert.

functions.name: frombin
functions.summary: Converts a binary string to a number. Assumes that the binary string represents a positive integer. For signed integers, use frombinsigned instead.

parameters.name: binString
parameters.description: The unsigned binary string to convert.

functions.name: frombinsigned
functions.summary: Converts a binary string to a signed integer. The binary string is interpreted as a two's complement signed integer. For unsigned integers, use frombin instead.

parameters.name: binString
parameters.description: The signed binary string to convert.

functions.name: tohex
functions.summary: Converts a number to its hexadecimal string representation. If number is negative, the result is a two's complement representation of the number with the minimum number of hex digits necessary to represent the value.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number to convert to hexadecimal string.

functions.name: tobin
functions.summary: Converts a number to its binary string representation. If number is negative, the result is a two's complement representation of the number with the minimum number of bits necessary to represent the value.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The number to convert to binary string.

functions.name: cplx
functions.summary: Creates a complex number from real and imaginary parts.

parameters.name: real
parameters.description: The real part of the complex number.

parameters.name: imaginary
parameters.description: The imaginary part of the complex number.

functions.name: cplxplr
functions.summary: Creates a complex number from its polar coordinates (magnitude and angle).

parameters.name: magnitude
parameters.description: The magnitude (absolute value) of the complex number.

parameters.name: angle
parameters.description: The angle (argument) of the complex number in radians.

functions.name: array
functions.summary: Creates a number array from values. Values will be casted to double internally.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to include in the array.

functions.name: max
functions.summary: Returns the maximum value among the provided numbers. If the 1st argument is an array, returns the maximum value in the array.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to compare. Can be individual numbers or an array of numbers.

functions.name: min
functions.summary: Returns the minimum value among the provided numbers. If the 1st argument is an array, returns the minimum value in the array.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to compare. Can be individual numbers or an array of numbers.

functions.name: count
functions.summary: Returns the count of numbers provided. If the 1st argument is an array, returns the count of elements in the array.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to count. Can be individual numbers or an array of numbers.

functions.name: average
functions.summary: Returns the average (arithmetic mean) of the provided numbers. If the 1st argument is an array, returns the average of the values in the array.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to average. Can be individual numbers or an array of numbers.

functions.name: sum
functions.summary: Returns the sum of the provided numbers. If the 1st argument is an array, returns the sum of the values in the array.

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The values to sum. Can be individual numbers or an array of numbers.

functions.name: factorial
functions.summary: Returns the factorial of a non-negative integer.

parameters.name: number
parameters.description: The non-negative integer for which to return the factorial.

functions.name: not
functions.summary: Returns the logical negation of the provided value.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value to negate.

functions.name: and
functions.summary: Returns the logical AND of the provided values.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: The first value.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: The second value.

functions.name: or
functions.summary: Returns the logical OR of the provided values.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: The first value.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: The second value.

functions.name: xor
functions.summary: Returns the logical XOR (exclusive OR) of the provided values.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: The first value.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: The second value.

functions.name: shiftleft
functions.summary: Returns the result of shifting the first value to the left by the number of bits specified by the second value.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: The value to shift.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: The number of bits to shift.

functions.name: shiftright
functions.summary: Returns the result of shifting the first value to the right by the number of bits specified by the second value.

parameters.name: value1
parameters.description: The value to shift.

parameters.name: value2
parameters.description: The number of bits to shift.
